zh.Lengefeld, Marienberg, Chemnitz, Sachsen: 德國薩辛可萊斯 馬利格倫格費爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Georg Reichel於大約1534年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 馬利格爾陳多福斯托爾海時，他的父親Jorg Reichel33歲，母親Elisabetha30歲。他於1559年與Margreth Mittelbach在德國薩辛可萊斯 馬利格倫格費爾德結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Georg Reichel于大约1534年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 馬利格爾陳多福斯托爾海时，他的父亲Jorg Reichel33岁，母亲Elisabetha30岁。他于1559年与Margreth Mittelbach在德国薩辛可萊斯 馬利格倫格費爾德结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Reichel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Arno, Fritz, Gerhardt, Heinz, Helmut, Herwig, Rudi, Ulrich, Wolfgang.
German: from a pet form of any of several ancient Germanic personal names formed with the ancient Germanic element rīc ‘power’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the Yiddish female personal name Raykhl, a pet form of Raykhe, which in turn is derived from Yiddish raykh ‘rich’.

variants.name: Reichelt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erna, Gerhard, Klaus, Lothar, Reiner, Wilhelm.

variants.name: Reichle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Albrecht, Claus, Fritz, Hans, Otto, Wieland.

variants.name: Reichl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Gunter, Hans.

variants.name: Rajchel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jozef, Janusz, Ryszard.

nameMeanings.name: Georg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Georg Reichel was born about 1534, in Stolzenhain, Wünschendorf, Kreis Marienberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Jorg Reichel, was 33 and his mother, Elisabetha, was 30. He married Margreth Mittelbach in 1559, in Lengefeld, Kreis Marienberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters.

ko.lifeSummary: Georg Reichel(이)가 대략 1534년 독일 작센 크레이스 마앵버그 wu슈도르프 스톨즌하인에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jorg Reichel(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabetha(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1559년 독일 작센 크레이스 마앵버그 렌그펠드에서 Margreth Mittelbach(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Georg Reichel nasceu aproximadamente 1534, em Stolzenhain, Wünschendorf, Kreis Marienberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Jorg Reichel, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Elisabetha, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Margreth Mittelbach em 1559, em Lengefeld, Kreis Marienberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Georg Reichel родился около 1534 г. в местности столзенан, вuнщэндорф, крис мариенбирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Jorg Reichel было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Elisabetha, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Margreth Mittelbach в 1559 г. в местности ленгефелд, крис мариенбирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Georg Reichel nació aproximadamente 1534, en Stolzenhain, Wünschendorf, Kreis Marienberg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Jorg Reichel, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Elisabetha, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Margreth Mittelbach en 1559, en Lengefeld, Kreis Marienberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas.
